001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
004import java.util.List;
005import java.util.Optional;
006import java.util.UUID;
007import org.springframework.data.domain.Limit;
008import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
009import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
010import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Modifying;
011import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.Query;
012
013/**
014 * Repository interface for {@link UserProfile} entity persistence operations.
015 */
016public interface UserProfileRepository extends JpaRepository<UserProfile, Long> {
017
018  /**
019   * Finds a user profile by OAuth2 key.
020   *
021   * @param oauthKey OAuth2 key to search for.
022   * @return {@link Optional} containing the user profile if found, empty otherwise.
023   */
024  Optional<UserProfile> findByOauthKey(String oauthKey);
025
026  /**
027   * Finds a user profile by external identifier.
028   *
029   * @param externalId user external ID.
030   * @return optional containing the user profile if found.
031   */
032  Optional<UserProfile> findByExternalId(UUID externalId);
033
034  /**
035   * Searches for user profiles whose display name contains the provided substring.
036   *
037   * @param displayName substring to search for.
038   * @param sort sort order.
039   * @param limit maximum number of results.
040   * @return matching user profiles.
041   */
042  List<UserProfile> findUserProfileByDisplayNameContaining(String displayName, Sort sort, Limit limit);
043
044  /**
045   * Disables a user profile by external identifier.
046   *
047   * @param externalId user external ID.
048   * @return number of rows updated.
049   */
050  @Modifying
051  @Query("UPDATE UserProfile SET userEnabled = FALSE WHERE externalId = :externalId")
052  int disableUser(UUID externalId);
053
054  /**
055   * Enables a user profile by external identifier.
056   *
057   * @param externalId user external ID.
058   * @return number of rows updated.
059   */
060  @Modifying
061  @Query("UPDATE UserProfile SET userEnabled = TRUE WHERE externalId = :externalId")
062  int enableUser(UUID externalId);
063
064  /**
065   * Sets manager privilege for a user profile by external identifier.
066   *
067   * @param externalId user external ID.
068   * @param isManager {@code true} to grant manager privileges; {@code false} to revoke.
069   * @return number of rows updated.
070   */
071  @Modifying
072  @Query("UPDATE UserProfile SET isManager = :isManager WHERE externalId = :externalId")
073  int setIsManager(UUID externalId, boolean isManager);
074
075
076
077}
